title: The Blue Hues
description: The Blue Hues is a vanilla-like tweaks texture pack for Minecraft, changing elements of the GUI and a couple of textures to blue themed elements.
body:
**The Blue Hues**
by galaxtric158

The Blue Hues is a minimalist texture pack that brings a calm, blue-toned aesthetic to your game. It subtly replaces select textures with blue-colored variants, focusing primarily on the GUI for a cleaner and more modern look.

In addition to the interface changes, this pack also features a retextured blue Elytra and blue Slimes as well as retexturing golden apples, adding a unique visual twist while staying true to the game’s original style.

Perfect for players who enjoy a sleek, cool-toned atmosphere without completely overhauling the game’s visuals. 

![new items and such](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d563e57fe300623bbb05de9aa87e3b5fe834653.png)

![more items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/923291c56bc9858742f6da97214909428247c805.png)

![1.3.2's new items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c7bd72b1c2553fcf4163b6bcb832c59790c657d.png)

![new hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6532d55768f65822784f676dc9d86fab557e15b.png)

![tbh 1.5 stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f13a7a602b7526068f76e3938b8d0db9b408389.png)

```
KEEP IN MIND THAT THIS TEXTURE PACK IS HEAVILY, HEAVILY BASED OFF OF VANILLA TWEAKS'S TWEAKS.
```
